title: Windmill in Bloom
alt: Painting of a windmill in a blooming field
description: A vibrant landscape featuring a traditional windmill surrounded by blooming wildflowers. Rich textures bring the countryside scene to life.

title: The Coming Storm
alt: Painting of a stormy sea and beach
description: A dramatic seascape capturing the raw power of nature as storm clouds gather over turbulent waters. Bold brushstrokes convey the energy of the approaching tempest.

title: River Bank
alt: Painting of a river bank with heavy texture
description: A serene riverside scene rendered in heavily textured acrylic. The impasto technique creates a tactile quality that invites the viewer to experience the landscape beyond the visual.
